title: Park Lane Academy (Calderdale): warning notice
body: "Notice relating to: Park Lane Academy  URN: 143115  Notice issued to: South Pennine Academies  Reason for issue: requires significant improvement Ofsted judgement  DfE regional director: Alison Wilson  DfE regional director office: Yorkshire and the Humber  Local authority: Calderdale Council "

taxons.title: Inspection of maintained schools and academies
